description: BUILD_SERVER modeled as Lock
ARTIFACT_STORE modeled as Lock
TEST_ENV modeled as Lock
PROD_ENV modeled as Lock
channel from BUILD_MASTER to FRONTEND_DEV for build/revision requests
channel from BUILD_MASTER to BACKEND_DEV for build/revision requests
channel from FRONTEND_DEV to BUILD_MASTER for build reports
channel from BACKEND_DEV to BUILD_MASTER for build reports
channel from BUILD_MASTER to QA_ENGINEER for test requests
channel from QA_ENGINEER to BUILD_MASTER for test reports
channel from BUILD_MASTER to RELEASE_ENGINEER for deploy/promote/abort signals
channel from RELEASE_ENGINEER to BUILD_MASTER for deploy reports
channel(s) from BUILD_MASTER to all agents for pipeline-complete
each developer's build can pass or fail
QA tests can pass or fail, triggering revision
staging deployment can succeed or fail
BUILD_MASTER decides promote or abort after staging
unit tests require prior compilation
publish requires passing unit tests
artifacts must be published before pull
staging deploy requires pulled artifacts
production deploy requires staging success
publish_artifact requires holding BOTH BUILD_SERVER and ARTIFACT_STORE simultaneously
QA testing requires holding TEST_ENV
staging deployment requires holding TEST_ENV
artifact pulls require holding ARTIFACT_STORE

FRONTEND_DEV and BACKEND_DEV both need BUILD_SERVER then ARTIFACT_STORE — if both acquire BUILD_SERVER first, second blocks; if one acquires ARTIFACT_STORE while other holds BUILD_SERVER, ABBA deadlock possible
QA_ENGINEER and RELEASE_ENGINEER both need TEST_ENV — QA tests and staging deploy cannot overlap
publisher (dev holding BUILD_SERVER+ARTIFACT_STORE) blocks QA/release pulls — pull cannot happen during publish
on build failure: BUILD_MASTER waits for BOTH reports before deciding; failed dev may re-need BUILD_SERVER that succeeded dev still holds for publish

on QA failure: BUILD_MASTER sends revision to dev(s), dev(s) re-build, QA re-tests — dev needs BUILD_SERVER+ARTIFACT_STORE, QA needs ARTIFACT_STORE+TEST_ENV, RELEASE_ENGINEER needs ARTIFACT_STORE+TEST_ENV
frontend and backend cannot build simultaneously (shared BUILD_SERVER)
